prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约11540→10487→10413→15739，2022–2024年基本稳定在10400–11500区间，2025年因高考模式改革（文理分科→3+1+2）出现大幅 后移约5300名；2025年基准位次约15739名；本省理科/物理类计划2022–2024年均为119人，2025年增至121人；2026年计划123人，较2025年小幅扩招2人 （+1.65%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升：2021年第30名→2026年第24名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合 实力和认可度增强；2024年曾出现招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理等负面舆情，导致投档线短期波动；但2025–2026年声誉回归平稳，无明显负面事件；抖音热 度总排名第13（高热），以食堂美食和正面评价为主，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估A-及以上7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与 工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A，农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐 ，农大相关工科专业受益；四川省2026年高考总人数约535,000人，按近年比例估算物理类约329,000人，较2025年284,789人增加约15.5%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；中国农业大学位于北京，对四川考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在四川招生占比约2–3%，属中等偏上水平，非本省高校无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 位次大幅后移的基准、2026年小幅扩招（+1.65%）、学校排名持续上升（软科24名）的正面信号、抖音高热度的关注度提升，以及四川省物理类考生规模大幅增加（+15.5%）带来 的竞争加剧，考虑学校层次提升和正面声誉的吸引效应，适度回调50名；预测最低位次约15845名，区间15345–16345名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 11540 → 10487 → 10413 → 15739. From 2022 to 2024, it remained stable in the 10400–11500 range. In 2025, due to the reform of the college entrance examination model (from arts/science division to 3+1+2), there was a significant backward shift of about 5300 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 15739. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 119 from 2022 to 2024, increased to 121 in 2025, and is planned to be 123 in 2026, a slight expansion of 2 places (+1.65%) compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising: from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, there were negative public opinions such as poor communication in enrollment and unreasonable major settings, leading to short-term fluctuations in admission scores. However, from 2025 to 2026, the reputation returned to stability with no significant negative events. Douyin popularity ranks 13th overall (high heat), mainly featuring cafeteria food and positive reviews, indicating high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 7 disciplines were rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A. The agricultural and forestry disciplines are top nationally, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended by social heat, benefiting related engineering majors at the Agricultural University. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, with an estimated 329,000 in the physics category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 284,789 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan is about 2–3%, at an upper-middle level, with no special regional preference as it is not a local university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of a significant ranking backward shift in 2025, a slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1.65%), positive signals from the university's rising ranking (Soft Science 24th), increased attention from high Douyin popularity, and intensified competition due to a substantial increase in the number of physics category candidates in Sichuan (+15.5%), along with the attraction effect of improved school level and positive reputation, a moderate adjustment of 50 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15845, with a range of 15345–16345.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15345–16345, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering, Veterinary Medicine, Agronomy, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Classes, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Water Resources Engineering, Horticulture, etc.) as a safe backup. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<15345), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (>16345), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.

The 2026 plan is 38, an increase of 2 students (+5.56%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, partially alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising: 30th in 2021 → 24th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, there was negative public opinion due to poor communication in enrollment, but reputation returned to stability in 2025–2026. Douyin popularity total ranking 13th (high heat), mainly positive exposure, with high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 A- or above disciplines. Although mainly agricultural and forestry disciplines, the university's overall strength is strong, and it has a brand effect on liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Law, Economics (including International Economics and Trade, Finance, Agricultural and Forestry Economic Management) and other liberal arts majors have high social popularity/recommendation. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 5.56% enrollment expansion in 2026, the positive signal of the university's continuously rising ranking, and the intensified competition due to a substantial increase in the number of history category candidates in Sichuan (+15.7%), with the large increase in candidate numbers being the main driver, a moderate upward adjustment of 30 places is made.
